svg.title: Bridge and Deep Topic Taxonomy
svg.desc: One-figure taxonomy of the repository's bridge pages plus deep and advanced algorithm lanes, grouped by family.

text.font-family: IBM Plex Sans, Inter, Arial, sans-serif
IBM Plex Sans, Inter, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Scope: high-value bridge pages plus deep and breadth lanes that shape retrieval. First-wave basics are still intentionally omitted.
